title: Tandem International Multilingual School
text: Tandem IMS - Campus Küsnacht Zurich Zollikon Erlenbach A Lakeside Campus for Future-Ready Learning Set directly by Lake Zurich, the Tandem IMS Campus Küsnacht unites the final years of Primary (Grades 5 & 6) and the Tandem IMS Gymnasium in one inspiring, modern environment. Designed for academic continuity and innovation, the campus offers both bilingual (English–German–French) and monolingual (German) learning paths giving every pupil the freedom to choose their best route toward the Swiss Matura. With small class sizes, multilingual teaching, and an inclusive community, pupils are encouraged to explore their interests, think critically, and grow with confidence. Tailored Learning Paths Primary School (5th & 6th Grade) Max. 18 pupils per classBilingual (German, English, French) or monolingual (German) trackPreparation for Gymnasium and DELF French exams Progymnasium (Sek A+) and Kurzgymnasium Swiss curriculum with focus on Design & Humanitarian Studies Bilingual track Pathway to Swiss Matura and university 10th Grade Gymnasium Preparation Bridge Year (Starting 2027/28) A focused bridge year combining intensive Kurzgymnasium preparation with design portfolio development — supporting academic readiness, creative talent, and informed next steps (e.g. Tandem IMS Gymnasium, Kantonsschule Küsnacht, Liceo Artistico, BMS 1, or creative pathways in architecture, design, and engineering). WELCOME TO TANDEM INTERNATIONAL MULTILINGUAL SCHOOL Each of our schools offer full day educational programmes and care. KüsnachtGymnasium & 5-6th grade learn more ZurichEarly Years to Primary learn more ZollikonEarly Years & Pre-School learn more ErlenbachEarly Years & Pre-School learn more Our Spaces Tandem IMS is a dynamic day school, offering high-quality multilingual education (German, English and French) in a warm and child-friendly environment where both local Swiss and international families are welcome. Our unique multilingual concept accompanies children from early childhood all the way to the Swiss Matura. All pupils engage in translanguaging, seamlessly incorporating German, English and French into their learning experience, supported by two native language teachers working together in the same classroom. In addition, our enquiry-based learning curriculum, based on the Primary Years Programme of the International Baccalaureate (IB) ensures a stimulating, creative and thought-provoking multidimensional education. Innovative Learning Environment Campus Küsnacht is a place that sparks creativity and collaboration.pupils benefit from specialised learning spaces such as: Design Studio & Art Studio Digital Media and Podcast Room Chemistry Lab & 3D Printing Workshop Quiet Study Areas and Reading Corners Every floor has been designed with the purpose to inspire curiosity, reflection, and teamwork. Why Families Choose The Tandem IMS Campus Küsnacht Prime location by the lake and close to train connections Innovative facilities for design thinking and digital learning Small classes and personalised support Bilingual and monolingual tracks for flexibility Smooth transition from Primary to Gymnasium Engaged international community of pupils and teachers Discover Our Campus Küsnacht Step inside a campus where every space tells a story.From bright classrooms to creative labs and relaxed study zones, Campus Küsnacht offers an environment that inspires every learner. Visit The Tandem IMS Campus Küsnacht We invite you to discover our lakeside campus and see how Tandem IMS empowers pupils to learn, create and achieve with confidence.Contact us to book a visit or attend our next information evening. 📍 Campus Küsnacht, Seestrasse 157/159, 8700 Küsnacht 📧 kuesnacht@tandem-ims.ch📞 +41 43 500 14 80 Our Other Campuses Tandem IMS has several locations on Lake Zurich.Each campus offers the same bilingual and international learning concept with its own friendly atmosphere: Campus Zurich – Nursery, Kindergarten, Primary & Gymnasium Campus Zollikon – Nursery Campus Erlenbach – Nursery & Kindergarten This structure allows families to benefit from a continuous educational journey, from the first nursery years all the way to the Matura. Sign up for our Newsletter Frequently asked questions What’s unique about the Küsnacht location? Our Küsnacht campus sits right on the lake, combining an inspiring natural environment with cutting-edge facilities for Primary and Gymnasium pupils. What facilities does the campus offer? Pupils have access to a Design Studio, Digital Media Room, Chemistry Lab, and creative project spaces for hands-on learning. Does the school bus operate for Küsnacht? Yes, the Tandem School Bus connects Küsnacht with Zürich, Zollikon, and Erlenbach for Primary pupils. However, Gymnasium pupils travel independently, as the schedule and level of independence differ. How does the location support wellbeing? The proximity to the lake and green surroundings offers plenty of opportunities for outdoor breaks, sports, and creative learning. Can pupils join directly at Küsnacht from another school? Yes. New pupils are welcome for Grades 5 and 6 or Gymnasium entry, with individual support for smooth integration. WHAT PARENTS SAY ABOUT OUR SCHOOLS Our daughter Milla started in Kindergarten 1 and finished in grade 6. We are so thankful to all the teachers, management and administration for the great work they do with the children. Tandem IMS offers a friendly environment and the warmth of a family. Milla had a lot of fun but she also learned a lot. She is not only academically strong in English and German and advanced in French but she developed as an individual who loves and respects people, who is independent and confident, who is free to express her opinion, who knows how to organize her daily life and work under pressure. As she said in her graduation speech: «Here in Tandem I had the best time of my life! I am looking forward to the future because I know I am well prepared for the next step of my life.» Our son Philip attended
